steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence in the passage. The decisive clue is what the sentence actually does: it describes what the Hibulb Cultural Center displays and how it designs its exhibits — a basic factual account of the institution.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It suggests improvements to a particular tribal cultural center.": the sentence makes no recommendations or suggestions for change; it only states what the center does. ✗
  • "It encourages tribal citizens to attend their local cultural center.": the sentence contains no call to action or persuasive appeal directed at tribal citizens. ✗
  • "It explains how one tribal cultural center differs from other tribal cultural centers.": the comparison between tribal cultural centers and non-Indigenous-led museums appears later in the passage, not in this sentence. ✗
  • "It provides a basic description of a particular tribal cultural center.": the sentence straightforwardly tells us what the Hibulb Cultural Center does (presents Tulalip history and culture) and how (using traditional knowledge to guide exhibit design). ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
